news.headline: UKRAINE FINANCE MINISTER MARCHENKO SAYS IN TALKS WITH OUR PARTNERS ON HOW TO RENEW EU EMERGENCY TRADE MEASURES DUE TO EXPIRE IN JUNE

news.summary: A groundbreaking collaboration has been announced as Kizik introduces the "Made to Move" campaign, aimed at providing hands-free solutions, education, and community involvement for individuals with Parkinson's disease across the United States. This unique partnership marks a significant milestone in the footwear industry. The initiative was launched in Salt Lake City on May 14, 2025, by Kizik, renowned for its cutting-edge hands-free footwear technology.
news.headline: Kizik partners with Parkinson's Foundation for "Made to Move" initiative to support independence. SALT LAKE CITY, May 14, 2025 /PRNewswire.
GERMAN FOREIGN MINISTER TO TRAVEL TO TURKEY FOR INFORMAL NATO MEETING ON THURSDAY - MINISTRY STATEMENT

news.summary: Septerna Inc. (NASDAQ: SEPN) and Novo Nordisk A/S (NYSE: NVO) recently disclosed an exclusive global partnership and licensing agreement for the development and commercialization of oral small-molecule drugs targeting obesity, type 2 diabetes, and other cardiometabolic conditions. This collaboration will involve the initiation of four key development projects. GPCRs, a vast group of cell membrane receptors influencing various physiological processes in the human body, are the primary focus of this innovative initiative. By leveraging its Native Complex Platform, Septerna aims to maximize the therapeutic potential of GPCR treatments. For further details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Novo Nordisk and Septerna form $2.2B deal for oral weight loss, diabetes drugs. Multiple development programs planned.

news.summary: An updated resort is inviting visitors to its vibrant property, showcasing The Backyard Pool & Social Club that boasts two pools, outdoor cabanas, various games, as well as dining and bar options. The official opening of the Blue Flamingo resort in Key West, Florida is scheduled for July 2025. Interested guests can find more information at www.blueflamingokeywest.com.
news.headline: Blue Flamingo Resort in Key West to open in July 2025, featuring two pools, cabanas, games, restaurants, and bars. Website: www.blueflamingokeywest.com.

news.summary: On Wednesday, the Dow Jones saw an increase fueled by the continued momentum of Nvidia and Tesla. Additionally, Super Micro experienced a significant surge following a lucrative $20 billion artificial intelligence agreement. This positive movement highlights the market's response to advancements in technology and strategic business deals.
news.headline: Dow Jones up due to Nvidia, Tesla rise; Super Micro surges on $20B AI deal.
Opening of direct air service between Russia and Malaysia is being worked out, Putin said

news.summary: In Rehovot, Israel, as of May 14, 2025, GeneNeer Ltd. welcomes Gusui Wu as the new Senior Scientific Advisor post his tenure as the Global Head of Seeds Research at Syngenta. Dr. Wu's appointment is touted to bring strategic direction and unparalleled expertise to the company.
news.headline: Gusui Wu, retired Global Head of Seeds Research at Syngenta, joins GeneNeer Ltd. as Senior Scientific Advisor.

news.summary: In a significant development, Consensus 2026 has announced its return to Hong Kong and launch in Miami, expanding the reach of the renowned crypto conference. After a successful debut in 2025, Consensus Hong Kong is back from February 10 to 12, 2026. This move comes as a part of efforts to broaden the conference's influence and engagement, catering to the growing interest in the crypto space. Scheduled to take place in Miami for the first time, this marks an important step for the long-running event.
news.headline: Consensus 2026 to return to Hong Kong and debut in Miami, expanding reach of influential crypto conference. Hong Kong event set for Feb 10-12, 2026, following sold-out debut in 2025.

news.summary: U.S. stocks showed gains in morning trading, with the Nasdaq Composite rising over 100 points on Wednesday. The Dow increased by 0.19% to 42,218.65, while the NASDAQ surged by 0.65% to 19,133.96. The S&P 500 also saw a rise of 0.29% to 5,903.54. Information technology shares notably rose by 1.1%, while utilities stocks fell by 1.1%. In company news, Sony Group Corporation (NYSE: SONY) surpassed expectations with fourth-quarter EPS results. Sony Group reported earnings of 21 cents per share, beating the estimated 12 cents per share. Quarterly sales reached $17.25 billion, missing the analyst consensus estimate. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Nasdaq gains over 100 points, Dow up 0.19% to 42,218.65, NASDAQ up 0.65% to 19,133.96, S&P 500 rises 0.29% to 5,903.54. Sony beats estimates with quarterly earnings of 21 cents per share and $17.25 billion in sales.

news.summary: Technology company Cisco Systems, Inc. (NASDAQ: CSCO) is set to announce its third-quarter financial results after the market closes on Wednesday, May 14. Analysts are predicting earnings of 92 cents per share, an increase from the 88 cents per share reported in the same quarter last year. Revenue for the quarter is projected to be around $14.06 billion, up from $12.7 billion in the previous year. Cisco has surpassed revenue expectations for over 10 consecutive quarters. On Tuesday, Cisco's stock closed at $61.78, representing a 0.2% increase. For more details on analyst ratings, readers can visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga.
news.headline: Cisco is set to report Q3 earnings, analysts predict 92 cents per share and $14.06 billion in revenue, up from $12.7 billion last year. Cisco stock gained 0.2%.

news.summary: Ethereum's market dominance has surged to overbought RSI levels not seen since May 2021, often followed by major pullbacks. Analysts predict a potential 10-15% price correction for ETH/USD, despite some viewing it as a "buy-the-dip" setup before a possible move towards $3,500-$3,800. Ethereum has outperformed the broader crypto market, with a 50% increase in May compared to 15.25% for the market. The rising dominance of Ethereum towards the critical 10% threshold for the first time since March has led to concerns of overheating. The RSI on Ethereum has reached its most overextended level since May 2021, indicating a possible local top. ETH.D daily performance charts suggest a potential decline towards the 50-day EMA support at around 8.24% by June. On the four-hour ETH/USD chart, bearish divergence signals a 15% price drop, with potential support zones at $2,330 or $2,190. Analysts suggest the decline could be a buying opportunity leading to a climb over $3,500. Veteran trader Peter Brandt predicts a rally to over $3,800, but readers are advised to conduct their own research as all investments involve risks.
news.headline: Ethereum regains 10% market share, but caution advised as potential 10-15% price correction looms. Analysts foresee $3,500-$3,800 target. ETH dominates with over 50% gain in May, outperforming broader crypto market. Overbought RSI levels signal pullback, urging caution for ETH bulls.

news.summary: In New York, CookUnity, a unique chef-led meal delivery platform, has recently acquired Fraîche. Fraîche is a premium smart fridge service targeted at businesses seeking to offer employees easy access to high-quality food. This acquisition positions CookUnity to further its goal of providing nutritious, chef-crafted meals wherever individuals are located. The smart fridges within the Fraîche network offer a range of elevated meals, curated healthy snacks, beverages, and breakfast options for workplaces, available 24/7.
news.headline: CookUnity acquires Fraîche, expanding chef-led meal delivery to workplaces, offering elevated meals, snacks, and drinks.
Two people were killed and 17 were injured in a bus accident in the Kursk region, Khinshtein said.

news.summary: GSK plc (NYSE: GSK) has announced its acquisition of Boston Pharmaceuticals' main asset, efimosfermin alfa, for a total cash consideration of up to $2 billion. This deal involves an upfront payment of $1.2 billion, with the potential for additional milestone payments of $800 million tied to the success of the product. GSK will also be responsible for paying success-based milestone payments and tiered royalties for efimosfermin to Novartis Pharma AG. Efimosfermin is a phase 3-ready specialty medicine aimed at treating and preventing the progression of steatotic liver disease (SLD). For further details, please refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: GSK to acquire Phase-3 liver disease drug for up to $2 billion, includes $1.2 billion upfront with potential $800 million in milestone payments.

news.summary: Stockholm, 14th May 2025 - Shareholders of SciBase Holding AB (publ), with registration number 556773-4768, are called to the annual general meeting scheduled for 17th June 2025 at 10:00 CEST at Advokatfirman Schjødt, Hamngatan 27, Stockholm. The meeting will address key corporate issues and decisions for the Company's future.
news.headline: SciBase Holding AB's annual general meeting on June 17, 2025, at 10:00 CEST in Stockholm.

news.summary: Today, in Wilmington, Delaware, DuPont (NYSE: DD) introduced the branding for Qnity, a new Electronics public company set to emerge following the spin-off of its intended division. This move symbolizes DuPont's dedication to innovation and collaboration. The unveiling on May 14, 2025, marks a significant step in the transformation, showcasing the power behind the partnership and forward-thinking approach.
news.headline: DuPont reveals brand identity for Qnity, spin-off. Represents innovation and partnership. Official announcement made on May 14, 2025.

Iran MFA: ‘ Baqaei: A meeting between political leaders of Iran and three European countries will be held on Friday The Foreign Ministry Spokesperson announced the holding of a meeting of political directors of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Islamic Republic of Iran

news.summary: Cisco Systems, Inc. recently announced significant partnerships and initiatives in the field of Artificial Intelligence (AI). The company revealed its collaboration with the AI Infrastructure Partnership (AIP), which includes BlackRock, GIP, MGX, Microsoft Corp., NVIDIA Corp., and xAI. By joining forces with energy companies GE Vernova, Inc. and NextEra Energy, Inc., Cisco aims to enhance AIP's platform for secure, efficient, and scalable AI infrastructure. AIP's primary objective is to attract $30 billion in capital from various investors, asset owners, and corporations. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Cisco partners with AIP, including BlackRock, GIP, Microsoft, NVIDIA, and xAI for AI advancements. AIP aims to unlock $30 billion in capital.

news.summary: Amazon Web Services (AWS), a subsidiary of Amazon.com, Inc., has partnered with HUMAIN, an AI innovation company based in Saudi Arabia (KSA), to invest more than $5 billion in creating an innovative "AI Zone" in the country. This zone will include specialized AWS AI infrastructure, UltraCluster networks, SageMaker, Bedrock, and Amazon Q to boost Saudi Arabia's AI development objectives. With an initial investment of $5.3 billion in an AWS infrastructure region in Saudi Arabia set to launch in 2026, this new AI Zone represents a strategic move to enhance the demand for cutting-edge AI services globally and locally.
news.headline: Saudi Arabia partners with AWS and NVIDIA, investing $5 billion in AI Zone to boost AI innovation in the Kingdom.
The process of Ukrainian settlement and the process of establishing relations with the United States are proceeding independently of each other, Peskov said.

news.summary: The report on the Agritech Market has been recently included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. In 2024, this market was valued at USD 24.42 billion, with a projection to reach USD 48.98 billion by 2030, indicating a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 12.30%. The market's growth is attributed to factors such as the rising need for sustainable agricultural methods, advancements in technology, and favorable government initiatives.Various key technologies are contributing to this growth.
news.headline: Global Agritech Market was valued at USD 24.42 billion in 2024, will reach USD 48.98 billion by 2030. CAGR of 12.30% driven by demand for sustainable agricultural practices, technological advancements, and government policies.

news.summary: Mediacom Communications, based in Mediacom Park, New York, has recently been named a 2025 US Best Managed Company in a program sponsored by Deloitte Private and The Wall Street Journal. This prestigious recognition is awarded to private companies in the United States that excel in strategic planning, execution, commitment to workforce, financial performance, and governance. The selected companies demonstrate outstanding performance in these areas, showcasing their dedication to success and excellence. Mediacom Communications stood out among the designees for its exemplary practices in various aspects of its operations.
news.headline: Mediacom Communications named a US Best Managed Company for 5th year by Deloitte & Wall Street Journal; excelling in strategic planning and Execution.

news.summary: The CEO of UnitedHealth Group Inc, Andrew Witty, is resigning for personal reasons. Stephen Hemsley, who served as CEO from 2006 to 2017, will take over. Hemsley will also continue as the chairman of the board, while Witty will become the senior adviser to the CEO. The company will pause its 2025 outlook due to a rise in care activity. UnitedHealth has noted an expansion in benefit offerings compared to the first quarter, with medical costs for many new Medicare Advantage beneficiaries at UnitedHealthcare still higher than expected.
news.headline: UnitedHealth Group CEO Andrew Witty resigns, Stephen Hemsley takes his place. Company suspends 2025 outlook.

news.summary: In a press release dated May 14, 2025, Neonode Inc. (NASDAQ: NEON) shared its financial performance for the quarter concluding on March 31, 2025. The report highlighted revenues of $0.5 million from ongoing operations during this period.
news.headline: Neonode Inc (NASDAQ: NEON) reports Q1 2025 revenues of $0.5 million.

news.summary: In Winnipeg, Manitoba on May 14, 2025, an American lodge owner expressed outrage after finding a significant number of caribou, including cows in advanced pregnancy, that had been slaughtered on his property in Northern Canada. Additionally, extensive vandalism was discovered on the same land. The owner is urging government officials and the Royal Canadian Mounted Police to intervene and address this disturbing incident.
news.headline: American lodge owner calls for action after discovering mass caribou slaughter and vandalism in Northern Canada.

news.summary: In Akron, Ohio on May 14, 2025, Advanced Light Detection and Ranging (LiDAR) technology has been implemented by FirstEnergy Corp. (NYSE: FE) throughout its service area to enhance the management of challenging trees and vegetation along 7,100 miles of high-voltage power lines. This initiative aims to improve the efficiency and effectiveness of the company's operations.
news.headline: LiDAR tech used by FirstEnergy to manage vegetation along 7,100 miles of power lines for enhanced efficiency.

news.summary: Atlanta-based company Liquid Web, known for its dedicated servers, WordPress, VPS, GPU, and cloud hosting solutions tailored for small to medium-sized businesses (SMBs), revealed on May 14, 2025, the introduction of cloud hosting services at its London data center. This new offering is designed to provide optimized support for businesses looking to enhance their online presence.
news.headline: Liquid Web launches cloud hosting in London data center for fast, reliable services in Europe; targets small to medium-sized businesses.
MOO Imbalance S&P 500: +141 mln Nasdaq 100: -4 mln Dow 30: +172 mln Mag 7: +4 mln

news.summary: TELUS Health is enhancing employee wellbeing solutions by integrating digital-first innovation with Workplace Options' Employee and Family Assistance Program. The acquisition by GTCR includes an investment of US$200 million to further develop TELUS Health's services. This strategic partnership aims to capitalize on GTCR's healthcare industry expertise to expedite the transformation of employee healthcare offerings.
news.headline: TELUS Health buy Workplace Options, top wellbeing services provider. $200 million injected by GTCR for transformation.

news.summary: Emplifi, a customer engagement platform based in New York, has recently received the Silver Stevie® Award for Achievement in Product Innovation at The 23rd Annual American Business Awards®. This prestigious recognition showcases Emplifi's success in digital marketing, commerce, and customer care. The American Business Awards are renowned for honoring organizations in the U.S. across public and private sectors. Emplifi's victory underscores its commitment to innovation and excellence in the industry.
news.headline: Emplifi wins Silver Stevie Award for Product Innovation at 23rd American Business Awards, Recognized for achievements in digital marketing, commerce, customer care. Prestigious U.S. business awards program with notable recognition across sectors.

news.summary: In Houston, Liongard, a prominent company specializing in Attack Surface Management, has introduced LiongardIQ, an innovative product designed to enhance modern cyber resilience. Scheduled for release in July 2025, LiongardIQ represents a significant advancement from its predecessor, incorporating real-time visibility and response capabilities, centralized asset intelligence, and integrated AI technology to provide intelligent Attack Surface Management. This development signifies a shift towards a next-generation platform with enhanced features.
news.headline: Liongard launches LiongardIQ, advanced Attack Surface Management tool, available starting July 2025 with enhanced features.

news.summary: In New York, Schrödinger, Inc. (Nasdaq: SDGR) revealed that the initial Phase 1 clinical results for SGR-1505, their MALT1 inhibitor under investigation, will be disclosed at the European Hematology Association Annual Congress held from June 12 to 15, 2025, in Milan, Italy. Subsequent data from the trial will also be presented at the International Conference on Malignant Lymphoma occurring from June 17 to 21, 2025, in Lugano, Switzerland. The Phase 1 study aims to assess the safety of the drug.
news.headline: Schrödinger to share Phase 1 data on MALT1 inhibitor SGR-1505 at EHA Annual Congress in Italy and ICML in Switzerland.

news.summary: South Korea may follow Hong Kong in legalizing spot Bitcoin exchange-traded funds (ETFs), with all three major presidential candidates expressing support. Currently, Bitcoin ETFs and institutional investments are banned in South Korea, leading to 100% retail volume. Democratic Party leader Lee Jae-myung promised to legalize spot crypto ETFs and create a safe investment environment, though progress has been delayed. While the candidates' pro-crypto pledges seem promising, some experts doubt immediate regulatory change. Despite potential reform, past delays in lifting bans suggest caution. In Hong Kong, the first Bitcoin and Ether-based ETFs launched in April 2024, but faced sluggish trading activity.
news.headline: South Korean presidential candidates favor legalizing Bitcoin ETFs, aiming to attract institutional investments. Concerns linger about regulatory changes. #Crypto #SouthKorea

news.summary: In Orlando, Florida, PlanSource organized its Eclipse conference from May 5 to May 7. This annual event gathered hundreds of industry professionals including HR leaders, brokers, consultants, carrier partners, and resellers. The main focus was on the future of benefits administration, with expert-led sessions, product exhibits, and engaging discussions. PlanSource, a prominent cloud-based benefits administration technology provider, highlighted its strategic vision that has been evolving over the years.
news.headline: PlanSource showcases AI-driven benefits administration vision at 2025 Eclipse Conference in Orlando. Event attracted hundreds of attendees for three days of sessions, showcasing future of benefits administration.

news.summary: On Tuesday, On Holding AG (NYSE: ONON) announced its first-quarter financial results, surpassing expectations. The company reported earnings of 23 cents per share, outperforming the analyst consensus of 16 cents per share. Additionally, On Holding revealed quarterly sales of $807.70 million, exceeding the analyst consensus estimate of $570.78 million. Caspar Coppetti, the Co-Founder and Executive Co-Chairman of On, expressed enthusiasm about the results, stating that they reflect the company's strong momentum in brand presence, spanning all channels, regions, and product categories. Coppetti emphasized On's commitment to becoming a leading global sportswear brand. Beyond the first quarter, the company is optimistic about its performance in the upcoming quarters.
news.headline: On Holding AG surpasses Q1 earnings expectations with 23 cents per share and $807.70 million in sales, exceeding forecasts.

news.summary: A new report by Homes.com, a CoStar Group online residential marketplace, delves into home prices in April using current data. The analysis examines price trends in major metro areas and implications for homebuyers. April saw a continued rise in home prices, albeit at a slower rate for the fourth month in a row. The median home price increased, indicating the housing market is still on an upward trend.
news.headline: Home prices rose in April but at a slower rate for the fourth month in a row, as per Homes.com report.

news.summary: Angel Oak Mortgage REIT, Inc. (NYSE: AOMR) based in Atlanta has revealed its plan to start an underwritten public offering of senior notes set to mature in 2030. These senior notes will be guaranteed by Angel Oak Mortgage Operating Partnership, LP on a senior unsecured basis. The Company will utilize the net proceeds from this offering for general corporate purposes.
news.headline: Angel Oak Mortgage REIT, Inc. (AOMR) to offer senior notes due 2030; guaranteed by Angel Oak Mortgage Operating Partnership, LP.

news.summary: Singapore-based Primech Holdings Limited, a technology-focused facility services provider, operating mainly in Singapore, disclosed on May 14, 2025, that it received notification from the Nasdaq Stock Market on May 13, 2025. The notification highlighted that the company, traded under the symbol PMEC, has met the minimum bid price requirement under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(a)(2) for ongoing listing on The Nasdaq Capital Market.
news.headline: Primech Holdings Limited regains Nasdaq compliance on bid price with notification on May 13, 2025. Operating in Singapore.

news.summary: In recent preclinical trials, significant progress was made in gene editing with HBG1/2 promoter, reaching therapeutically significant levels. The approach utilized a clinically tested editing strategy, resulting in desirable biodistribution outcomes in non-human primates. This development marks a promising advancement in the field of gene editing with potential implications for future therapies.
news.headline: Editas Medicine to share in vivo HSC delivery data at EHA 2025 Congress, showing high gene editing levels in HBG1/2 promoter & positive biodistribution in primates.

news.summary: A company based in Cincinnati, Standard Textile, revealed that it has been named a Gold Standard winner for the 2025 US Best Managed Company award. This recognition is part of a program sponsored by Deloitte Private and The Wall Street Journal, which aims to acknowledge exceptional private companies in the United States. The 2025 edition of this award highlights the achievements of Standard Textile and its commitment to excellence.
news.headline: Standard Textile named US Best Managed Company for 5th year, winning Gold Standard award, sponsored by Deloitte Private & The Wall Street Journal.

news.summary: In Santa Clara, California, on May 14, 2025, VisitorsCoverage, a leading global travel insurance marketplace and innovator in insurtech, received recognition for their exceptional customer service team. They were honored with a Bronze Stevie® Award for Customer Service Team of the Year at the 2025 American Business Awards®. This prestigious accolade highlights their dedication to providing outstanding service.
news.headline: VisitorsCoverage wins Bronze Stevie® Award for Customer Service Team of the Year at the 2025 American Business Awards®.

news.summary: On March 27th, 2025, Provident Industrial, a division of Provident based in Dallas, successfully closed the development of Eastex 59, a planned four-building industrial park in North Houston. This project marks a significant milestone for the company in the thriving North Houston submarket.
news.headline: Provident Industrial acquires Eastex 59 in Houston, TX on March 27, 2025, a 4-building industrial park in North Houston.

news.summary: OneStream announced new tools, including Allocations, Analytic Drill-Down, and Admin Assist, aimed at assisting Finance leaders in confidently navigating variability. These additions come as part of OneStream's enterprise finance management platform, which integrates core financial and operational functions. The announcement was made in Nashville, Tennessee on May 14, 2025. These tools aim to provide Finance leaders with enhanced abilities to handle fluctuations in financial data effectively.
news.headline: OneStream introduces new tools and enhancements to enhance productivity. Includes Allocations, Analytic Drill-Down, and Admin Assist. Nashville, Tenn. May 14, 2025.

news.summary: GTCR, a prominent private equity firm, has revealed on May 14, 2025 that it has finalized the acquisition of Workplace Options. This move is expected to bolster TELUS Health's global footprint and technological capabilities for Employee Assistance Programs. The agreement was swiftly signed and executed to align with TELUS Health's strategic goals. This development marks a significant step for both companies in furthering their presence in the market.
news.headline: GTCR invests $200M in preferred equity to support TELUS Health's acquisition of Workplace Options, expanding global reach.

news.summary: New Haven, Connecticut - On May 14, 2025, Square 9 Softworks unveiled InquireAI, an innovative generative AI-driven capture automation tool aimed at revolutionizing decision-making processes. This cutting-edge solution aims to enhance reliability through accurate data analysis. With InquireAI, users can streamline operations by leveraging advanced artificial intelligence capabilities. This release marks a significant advancement in the realm of technology and data management, offering unparalleled efficiency.
news.headline: Square 9 Softworks releases InquireAI, an AI-powered capture automation solution revolutionizing data processing.

news.summary: A groundbreaking Delivery versus Payment solution was recently executed on the testnet of Ondo Chain. This pioneering transaction involved the settlement of Ondo Finance's Tokenized Fund (OUSG) through J.P. Morgan's Kinexys Digital Payments network on the Ondo Chain platform. This marks a significant milestone as the first of its kind, showcasing the successful integration of different networks.
news.headline: Chainlink, Kinexys by J.P. Morgan, and Ondo Finance partner for a DvP solution. Testnet settles OUSG fund with Kinexys network on Ondo Chain.

news.summary: The award-winning fleet will be expanded with the addition of the largest and newest vessel, Costa Fortuna. This addition will bring new opportunities for all-new itineraries and experiences. A soon-to-be-announced homeport in 2026 will cater to this new vessel. The announcement was made in Orlando, Florida on May 14, 2025, marking the third anniversary of the fleet's success.
news.headline: Margaritaville at Sea acquires Costa Fortuna, their third vessel in three years, expanding fleet and offering new itineraries.

news.summary: Sun-Maid Growers of California, based in Fresno, has been named a 2025 US Best Managed Company. This prestigious recognition is awarded by Deloitte Private and The Wall Street Journal to outstanding private companies in the US. The program signifies excellence in management and operational practices. Sun-Maid is honored to be among the top companies selected in the 2025 cohort.
news.headline: Sun-Maid Growers of California named 2025 US Best Managed Company by Deloitte Private and The Wall Street Journal.

news.summary: Karyopharm Therapeutics Inc., based in Newton, Massachusetts, shared that their abstract has been chosen for a poster presentation at the 2025 European Hematology Association Annual event. The company, which is listed on Nasdaq as KPTI, specializes in innovative cancer treatments. This news was revealed on May 14, 2025.
news.headline: Karyopharm to present poster on Selinexor in Myelofibrosis at 2025 European Hematology Association Annual Meeting.
